query:
SELECT eal.id, eal.alunoId, a.name, eal.tipoAlerta, eal.createdAt 
FROM email_alertas_log eal 
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = eal.alunoId 
WHERE eal.alunoId IN (30055, 30064) 
AND eal.tipoAlerta = 'onboarding_lembrete_24h'
ORDER BY eal.createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT eal.id, eal.alunoId, a.name, eal.tipoAlerta, eal.createdAt 
FROM email_alertas_log eal 
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = eal.alunoId 
WHERE eal.alunoId IN (30055, 30064) 
AND eal.tipoAlerta = 'onboarding_lembrete_24h'
ORDER BY eal.createdAt DESC;
